description.en: For elementary, middle, and high school students, StudySapuri offers unlimited access to over 40,000 video lessons from professional instructors. These acclaimed easy-to-understand lessons help boost grades efficiently in less time, at a price far lower than cram schools, prep schools, and correspondence education.
description.ja: 小中高校生向けに、4万本以上のプロ講師の授業動画が見放題！分かりやすいと評判の「神授業」だから短時間でギュッと効率的に成績アップが目指せる！塾や予備校・通信教育を圧倒的に下回る料金でご提供します。

settings.title: Show Timestamp
settings.description: Show playback timestamps only while a lesson video is actively playing.
